title: Hyperdrive
excerpt: description: Accelerate access to your existing databases from Cloudflare Workers with Hyperdrive's global connection pooling and query caching. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/hyperdrive/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Turn your existing regional database into a globally distributed database. Hyperdrive is a service that accelerates queries you make to existing databases, making it faster to access your data from across the globe from [Cloudflare Workers](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/), irrespective of your users' location.
